---
title: "About"
format:
  html:
    include-after-body:
      text: |
        <script src="https://hypothes.is/embed.js" async></script>
---

::: {.callout-tip collapse="false"}
## Share Your Feedback

Use the [Hypothesis](https://hypothes.is/) sidebar (click the `<` button on the right edge) to annotate this page. Your comments help improve the project!
:::

## The Unjournal Pivotal Questions Project

This dashboard is part of [The Unjournal's](https://unjournal.org) **Pivotal Questions** initiative, which aims to synthesize research on high-stakes questions for effective altruism and global priorities.

### Cultured Chicken Focus

The cultured chicken pivotal question asks:

> What will be the production cost of cultured chicken by [target year], and what are the implications for animal welfare?

This model helps evaluators and forecasters:

1. **Quantify uncertainty** in cost projections
2. **Identify key drivers** of cost reduction
3. **Compare scenarios** based on technology adoption
4. **Inform funding decisions** for animal welfare organizations

## Model Development

### Contributors

- **David Reinstein** (The Unjournal) - Project lead
- **David van der Linden** - Model validation
- **Jacob Kozlowski** - Financial modeling
- **Ash Meader** - TEA literature review

### Sources

The model synthesizes insights from:

- Risner et al. (2021) - UC Davis ACBM Calculator
- CE Delft TEA studies
- Humbird (2021) - Scale-up economics
- Rethink Priorities forecasts
- Good Food Institute market reports

## Contact

- [The Unjournal](https://unjournal.org)
- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/unjournal/cm_pq_modeling)
- [Pivotal Questions Documentation](https://globalimpact.gitbook.io/the-unjournal-project-and-communication-space/pivotal-questions)

## License

This project is open source. Model code and documentation are available under MIT license.
